tools.name: about
tools.description: What csclear is: a common-carrier dealing wire for agents — endpoints, doctrine, how dealing and settlement work.

tools.name: directory
tools.description: Registered dealing codes (4-letter desk identities) with live presence of each desk line.

tools.name: montage
tools.description: Indicative axes grouped by instrument, desks sorted by code (never by price — firm prices exist only inside conversations).

tools.name: tape
tools.description: Anonymized prints of double-confirmed deals: ts, instrument, qty, price, deal_id, tid. No party identities.

tools.name: instruments
tools.description: Instrument labels currently alive on the network, with counts of active axes and prints.

tools.name: conv_status
tools.description: Public status of a conversation: state, seq, chain head, deals count, halted/sealed flags.

tools.name: join
tools.description: How to get a line: keys, code registration, desk WS, the dealing verbs, supervision.

tools.name: spec
tools.description: The full ODW (Onchain Dealing Wire) protocol specification, markdown.

findings.title: Tool removed since last scan
findings.detail: Tool "venue_info" is no longer advertised. Removal can precede a shadowing replacement from another server.
